name: meta-skill
description: Create, evaluate, and improve reusable skills with focused authoring workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Create, evaluate, and improve reusable skills.
interface.longDescription: Meta Skill bundles skill-create, skill-eval, and skill-improve as focused guidance for portable skill payloads, optional .meta-skill workbenches, scenario evidence, bounded improvement plans, releases, and packages.
defaultPrompt: Create a reusable skill for this workflow.
Evaluate this skill with scenario evals.
Plan a bounded improvement from eval evidence.
